combined_text_for_llm: Market Division or Customer Allocation "Market Division or Customer Allocation Plain agreements among competitors to divide sales territories or assign customers are almost always illegal. These arrangements are essentially agreements not to compete: ""I won't sell in your market if you don't sell in mine."" The FTC uncovered such an agr
